reviews.review_description:
Unfortunately this game is incomplete. Multiplayer does not work. There has not been an update in months. Developers say they are having money problems. They no longer answer on discord. Consider this game abandoned.  Had so much potential but they blew the momentum they had at launch. Can't recommend an incomplete game.

Update November 2024:
Developers have announced update. There is absolutely no change. Multiplayer still doesn't work. There is no attachment support. This game is miles behind other tennis games. 1 star should be 0 stars. The option for 0 is not available.
So much fun to play, simple to pick up but challenging to master! The controls are smooth, making it a great way to train.
I love this game. The mechanics are simple and realistic and I didn't get any motion sickness even when teleporting frequently. I really enjoy the arcade mode haha what a clever idea :)
Having an immense amount of fun with this game. The single player mode is great fun and the environments are beautifully done, as is the lobby. Really good simulation of tennis...

This game is fun with a workout out in it as well it will keep you on your toes  , I like that it’s single user or that you can play multiplayer , there is a training mode which is a plus in my book . I really like the droid rush mode. And I like that you can play online multiplayer

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review, glad to hear you enjoy Droid Rush a lot!

reviews.review_description: Not good

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear Tennis League VR did not meet your expectations! Could you please let us know what could we do better?

reviews.review_description: Someone has a discord group chat about this game so we can manually play together????? Just dm me
You cant change your dominate hand. I tried deleting the game and re install it snd didn’t work.

developer_response.body: Hi, you can change your dominating hand from the main game hub!

reviews.review_description: I didn’t like it at all. Doesn’t simulate real tennis

developer_response.body: Hi, sorry to hear you didn't like our game. Have you tried switching the control setting to simulation in the menu? Some players find it much more realistic!

reviews.review_description: Stuff is so expensive nowadays and I am very upset to say I bought this app for it to work for a week or so, then get stuck on the loading screen. Did as many updates as there were, tried to shut it off and turn it back on, nothing. Had to end up resetting my whole VR , just for it to work for a night. I want a refund because why should I pay for something that isn’t going to work?

developer_response.body: We are sorry to hear recent updates did not fix the issue for you, could you kindly email us at support@tennisleaguevr.com ? we would like to ask you some questions to understand better what's the cause of the problem and fix it

reviews.review_description: Pleasantly surprised by the robots minigame. I didn't have any expectations but now I love it. Would be nice if the devs could add power-ups, like dual rackets or something!

This is a game that I’ve been waiting for with a fine rendering of the game play and full experience. Great start. Full of potential. 

Get it for 25% off by using the code: https://tinyurl. com/BigVoleTennis
(with no space before the .com!)
Game can be better have to hit the ball less harder to be able to play and it gets hard to press the buttons and teleport to where the ball is gonna land :(

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Did you know there's a Simulation control mode and possibility to switch from teleport movement to analog? You can enable those options from the game menu, it might make your experience better! Let us know if that works for you and if so please consider leaving a higher score :)

reviews.review_description: Best game
I love this game. I got it yesterday and my arms are so sore. I played over 2 hours.

reviews.review_title: Impossible for A Man with Asperger's.
reviews.review_description: I would miss most of the target squares on the other side trying to swing the ball over.

developer_response.body: Hey there, have you played the tutorial and/or tried the tennis fundamentals lessons in the Training mode? They help a lot in getting the hang of the control and learning how to swing properly :)

reviews.review_description:
Could you please refund my money back, it’s been almost 1 month I have been reaching out about this problem.  Games is still not loading. You stated it’s been reset, but it’s not resolved. Still stuck on loading, but never loads.  

Today is 7/13/2023


Still not working, doesn’t load.  I’m unable to give an updated review for an app I’ve purchased that doesn’t work or load. Unable to play. 

7/5/2023


Received message.  Still not working. 6/26/23
I would like a refund. This game does not play. 
It’s not loading and I paid for this game. Stuck on loading, but it never loads. I like the game, but I’m unable to play, because of this error.  It’s been like this for 6 days now. If you’re unable to fix, I would like a refund. 

Please fix. Thank you.

developer_response.body: We are sorry to hear recent updates did not fix the issue for you, could you kindly email us at support@tennisleaguevr.com ? we would like to ask you some questions to better understand what might be causing the issue

reviews.review_description:
This game sucks 
Ai is the same difficulty as in the demo 4 rounds in WTF!

developer_response.body: Hello, the difficulty of the AI of the game increases through the career mode. If you pass the first tournament (which is the only one available in the demo), you'll notice the difficulty scales up significantly.

reviews.review_description: It’s unplayable

developer_response.body: July 3: Hi, we have issued an issued an hotfix last week that addressess the issue you mentioned. Can you give it a check and consider updating your review? It'll be very helpful for us. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: THIS is the tennis game you want!
reviews.review_description:
I tried the other popular tennis game but found it too unrealistic/automated (I intentionally served terribly but they corrected all my bad form!). Tennis League is way more fun, has great practice modes, & let’s you fail when you suck so you can actually get better. My serve is improving, & just today I discovered Simulation mode which is less polished - my ball toss needs work! (stick to Arcade mode for a perfect toss each time).

The only feature I’d request is to be able to see SERVE SPEED - I had a few fast ones today & was really curious about it… All in all it’s a great tennis game, I play every time I’m in VR!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review and feedback, much appreciated!
